name: taste
description: Stanley Tucci's Taste — food and life memoir exploring how food connects us to family, love, grief, travel, and identity, from an Italian-American childhood to Big Night to cooking through loss
useCase: Understand the power of food as memory, learn to cook with joy, navigate grief through cooking, and reconnect with family through shared meals
knownRisks: This is a celebrity memoir — it is entertaining but not a systematic guide to cooking
Tucci's privilege (travel, restaurant access, famous friends) is not representative
Some may find the grief chapters emotionally difficult
